name: Fihserman's Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb Bacon cut in small pieces
1/3 cup Instant mashed potatoes to thicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy soup pot or kettle, brown the bacon with the paprika, onion, and potato, sautéing until the potato and onions are soft and the bacon is cooked.
2. Add the clams, white wine, crab legs/imitation crab, shrimp, scallops, and any other seafood or fish.
3. Season with salt, pepper, bay leaf, and thyme.
4. Stir in the skim milk and heat over low flame, stirring constantly. Do not allow the mixture to boil.
5. When the seafood and fish are thoroughly heated through, thicken the chowder by adding instant potatoes. Remove the bay leaf and serve. Chowder may be prepared ahead, refrigerated, then reheated in a crock pot or over very low heat.
